description_long: This object represents an adult pedestrian, depicted with a naturalistic human form and proportions. The figure appears to be wearing standard urban attire, with a fitted upper garment and long pants, suggesting everyday or casual wear suitable for city environments. The posture is upright, with arms relaxed at the sides and legs straight, indicating a neutral standing position. No accessories or carried items are visible, and the silhouette is clean and uninterrupted. The surface is uniformly colored, with no visible textures, patterns, or fine details such as facial features or garment seams. The overall appearance is stylized and minimal, focusing on the general shape and outline of an adult human figure.
description: A standing adult pedestrian figure in casual urban clothing, with a clean, minimal silhouette and no visible accessories. The posture is upright and relaxed, with a smooth, uniform surface.
description_view_0: The figure is mostly in shadow, with little detail visible; the outline of the head and shoulders is faintly discernible.
description_view_1: A partial side view reveals the angular outline of the head, torso, and arms, with the upper body and limbs clearly separated from the background.
description_view_2: This view shows the figure's profile, highlighting the straight posture and the distinct separation between the arms and torso.
description_view_3: The figure is almost entirely in darkness, with no discernible features visible.
attribute_clothing_type: casual long-sleeve top and full-length pants
